AWP.awp_feature_modal_note: While no SmartAdvice has been generated for this website, you may enable these features manually as they are likely to improve performance.

billing.ask_admin_for_upgrade:
To continue you need to have a subscription.
Please contact your administrator to upgrade the subscription.

AWP.cdn_subscription_limit_reached_descripti: Please update your subscription to continue using this feature.
AWP.contact_administrator_description: The admin does not specify the link to upgrade. Please contact your admin to get premium.
AWP.error_log_tooltip: The error occurs while managing the module for this website
AWP.i_have_read_and_agree_with: I have read and agree with
AWP.incompatibility_tooltip: The website is incompatible with this module
AWP.misconfiguration_tooltip: Misconfigurations between your website and this module

module_accelerate_wp.name: AccelerateWP
module_accelerate_wp.short_description: Page сaching and cache preloading, browser caching, lazy loading, CSS/JS optimization and more

module_cdn.name: Content Delivery Network
module_cdn.short_description: Distributes content throughout the world by caching content close to where each end user is accessing the internet.

module_critical_css.name: Critical Path CSS
module_critical_css.short_description: Critical Path CSS eliminates render-blocking CSS on your website and improves browser page render performance. Your website will load much faster for your visitors.

module_image_optimization.name: Image Optimization
module_image_optimization.short_description: Website load times and the speed score for many of your site visitors can be improved by enabling the Image Optimization.

AWP.module_incompatibility_detected: Some modules cannot be enabled. Open settings for more details

module_object_cache.name: Redis Object Cache
module_object_cache.short_description: Stores database query results in additional storage for quick access.

no_allowed_features.contact_support: AccelerateWP is currently disabled, you'll need to contact support for more info.
no_allowed_features.description: AccelerateWP helps to solve performance issues of your website. It includes Optimization features that can be activated for WordPress sites easily.
no_allowed_features.link_text: Here is the link to the guide.

AWP.pages_expecting_speedup: {pages} pages are expected to be speed up:
AWP.payment_pending_explanation: The premium features you enabled will be applied to your WordPress website in several minutes. To check if features were applied, please refresh the page. You can close this window.
